As Bitcoin Consolidates, Signs Point to Potential Bottom Amid Market Calm: Research

Bitcoin’s price has steadied over the last month, suggesting the worst of the market turbulence may be behind us.

title: Bitcoin Price Rises as Iran Signals Push for Full End to Conflict
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Price Rises as Iran Signals Push for Full End to Conflict

Bitcoin price edged higher Wednesday as markets responded to reports that Iran may be seeking a full end to its conflict with Israel rather than a temporary ceasefire.

This post Bitcoin Price Rises as Iran Signals Push for Full End to Conflict first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis Confirmed As A Bitcoin 2026 Speaker
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis Confirmed As A Bitcoin 2026 Speaker

U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis has been officially confirmed as a speaker at Bitcoin 2026. A Republican senator from Wyoming, Lummis currently serves as Chair of the Senate Banking Subcommittee on Digital Assets — a role she was appointed to in January 2025 to lead the Banking Committee’s efforts on digital asset legislation. She has publicly […]

This post U.S. Senator Cynthia Lummis Confirmed As A Bitcoin 2026 Speaker first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Jenna Montgomery.

title: Banks Took $434 Billion From Americans Last Year — Is it Time for Bitcoin?
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Banks Took $434 Billion From Americans Last Year — Is it Time for Bitcoin?

Banks generated $434 billion in 2025 from deposit spreads, while savers lost purchasing power to inflation. Bitcoin shows another way.

This post Banks Took $434 Billion From Americans Last Year — Is it Time for Bitcoin? first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
